primaryUse: AI research judgment, self-supervised learning, world models, and long-horizon architecture critique.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public papers, lectures, official pages, and licensed repositories as source anchors.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: BSD/GPL repositories can be reused only according to each repository license.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.

sources.license: site/copyright; papers and code have their own licenses
sources.notes: Primary official archive for publications and background.

gaps: Paper copyright and code licenses vary by item; fetch exact source metadata before ingesting.
